start.verified: рЯОЙ You've become a verified user with full access to bot's functionality!
start.about_prompt: Would you like to write a short bio about yourself? It helps other alumni get to know you.
start.checking_email:
рЯФО Checking your email in the NES databaseвА¶
Please wait
start.email_check_failed: вЪ†пЄП We couldn't verify your email right now. Please try again in a moment.
start.email_not_in_nes:
вЭМ We couldn't find this email in the NES alumni database.

start.email_not_shared:
рЯФТ We found your NES profile, but it isn't shared in the alumni directory, so we can't verify you yet.

Please enable вАЬShow in a class' directoryвАЭ in your profile settings on my.nes.ru, then send your email again.
start.email_not_in_nes_admin: вЪ†пЄП User {username} (ID: {chat_id}) tried to register with email `{email}` but it was not found in the NES system.
start.not_alumni:
вЭМ Your email was found, but you are not registered as a NES alumni yet.
Please contact NES or try again later.
help.panel_header:
вЭУ Help

If you need assistance, you can send a help request to the admins. They will receive your message and get back to you.
help.request_sent: вЬЕ Your help request has been sent to the admins.
find.enter_query: Type text to search for a person
find.too_long:
Your text is too long.
Please, reduce it by {percent}%
admin.panel_header:
вЪЩпЄП Admin Panel

вАҐ рЯУЛ Logs вАФ download bot logs
вАҐ рЯТђ Messages вАФ view messages of a user
вАҐ рЯУ§ Send вАФ send a message to a user
вАҐ рЯУҐ Send All вАФ broadcast to all verified users
вАҐ рЯЪЂ Blocking вАФ block or unblock a user
вАҐ вЪЩпЄП Matching вАФ run matching or request feedback
вАҐ рЯС• Admins вАФ manage admin list
вАҐ рЯУК Statistics вАФ view platform analytics
вАҐ рЯПЈпЄП Title вАФ edit the hub panel header
вАҐ рЯОУ MyNES вАФ import alumni from MyNES
admin.logs_header:
рЯУЛ Logs

Download the bot logs:

вАҐ рЯРЫ Debug вАФ full structured logs (DEBUG)

admin.mynes_header:
рЯОУ MyNES Directory Sync

Alumni profiles are mirrored from the MyNES directory automatically every hour (Postgres + search index). Use the button below to run a sync right now.
admin.mynes_sync_running: вП≥ Syncing from the MyNES directoryвА¶ The first run can take a few minutes while profiles are indexed.
admin.mynes_sync_busy: вП≥ A sync is already in progress. Please wait for it to finish.
admin.mynes_sync_failed: вЭМ MyNES sync failed. Check the logs for details.
admin.blocking_not_found: вЭМ No user @{username} found. They need to start the bot first.
admin.blocking_is_admin: вЭМ @{username} is an admin and cannot be blocked.

admin.admins_enter_remove: Enter username of the admin to remove (e.g. @vbalab):
admin.admins_not_found: вЭМ No user @{username} found. They need to start the bot first.
admin.admins_added: вЬЕ @{username} has been added as admin.
admin.admins_removed: вЬЕ @{username} has been removed from admins.
admin.admins_cannot_remove_self: вЭМ You cannot remove your own admin permissions.
admin.matching_header:
вЪЩпЄП Matching Panel

Run a new matching round or request feedback from the last round.
admin.matching_demo_running: рЯІ™ Building a demo matchingвА¶ (dry run вАФ nobody is notified)
admin.matching_demo_empty: No eligible users to match right now.
admin.matching_demo_done: вЬЕ Demo matching ready вАФ {users} users, {pairs} pairs. No round was saved and no notifications were sent. See the attached Excel.
admin.matching_done: вЬЕ Matching complete. {count} users received matches.
admin.matching_no_rounds: No matching rounds have been run yet.
admin.matching_no_assignments: No assignments found in the last round.
admin.matching_feedback_sent: вЬЕ Feedback requests sent for {count} assignments.
matching.intro:
рЯСЛ Hi! This is NESpresso вАФ the New Economic School alumni networking bot you registered with.

Every so often we run a matching round: alumni get paired up to meet вАФ a coffee, a call, whatever works. A new round just started, and we picked {count} fellow alum for you.

I'll send their profile(s) in the next message(s). Take a look and feel free to reach out to set something up. вШХпЄП
matching.feedback_question: рЯСЛ Hi! A quick follow-up on your last NESpresso matching round вАФ were you able to connect with {name}?
